summary: Tested Advisory page fixes: AI contextual responses, concierge modal, Near Me internal navigation, and Shop page breed filter. All requested features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: advisory_routes.py ask-advisory endpoint correctly uses contextual AI prompt (lines 1258-1295) that instructs AI to answer ONLY about what user asked
AdvisoryPage.jsx correctly implements ConciergeModal component (lines 449-508) with openConciergeModal() function
Near Me section uses internal routes: /services?category=training, /services?category=grooming, /services?category=vet, /shop (lines 851-854)
ShopPage.jsx correctly defines ALL_BREEDS array with 35 breeds (lines 876-883)
seed_data_creation: Advisory products (12) already seeded by main agent via /api/advisory/admin/seed
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Advisory page fixes verified working: (1) AI gives contextual responses based on user question, (2) Talk to Concierge buttons open modal with WhatsApp/Email/Call options, (3) Near Me service cards navigate internally to /services or /shop, (4) Shop page breed filter shows all 35 breeds. Backend API tests in test_advisory_page_fixes.py.

advisory_ai_contextual_responses.details: Travel prep checklist query returns travel-specific advice with keywords: travel, carrier, document, vet, checklist. Food query returns food-specific advice.

concierge_modal.details: Talk to Concierge buttons open modal dialog with WhatsApp, Email, Call options - not direct WhatsApp redirect

near_me_internal_navigation.details: Pet Trainers navigates to /services?category=training, Groomers to /services?category=grooming, Vets to /services?category=vet, Pet Stores to /shop - all internal routes

shop_breed_filter.details: 36 breed filter buttons found: All Breeds + 35 specific breeds (Labrador Retriever, Golden Retriever, German Shepherd, Shih Tzu, Pug, Beagle, Poodle, Indie, Indian Pariah, Cocker Spaniel, Dachshund, Boxer, Great Dane, Siberian Husky, Doberman, Rottweiler, French Bulldog, English Bulldog, Yorkshire Terrier, Maltese, Pomeranian, Chihuahua, Border Collie, Australian Shepherd, Cavalier King Charles, Miniature Schnauzer, Boston Terrier, Dalmatian, Lhasa Apso, Bichon Frise, Akita, Samoyed, Bernese Mountain Dog, St. Bernard, Mixed Breed)

advisory_products_seeded.details: Advisory products endpoint returns products from database
